description: PSA benchmark suite: 3 models for PSA-only testing (large populations or many reactions make exact SSA impractical)
reference: Lin YT, Feng S, Hlavacek WS (2019) J Chem Phys 150: 244101

models.name: tcr_signaling
models.notes: Bistable stochastic switching; PSA Nc=300 gives 8x speedup over SSA

models.name: prion_aggregation
models.notes: Nucleated polymerization; 2809 reactions make SSA slow

models.name: erk_activation
models.notes: Populations up to 3e6; exact SSA infeasible (billions of events)
